# psi-swarm

> Distributional Lighthouse / PageSpeed audits with grounded performance analysis across the fleet.

## Product

- [Home](https://performance.sassmaker.com/): Perf dashboards
- [Projects](https://performance.sassmaker.com/projects/): Per-project results

## Machine surfaces

- [Agent catalog](https://performance.sassmaker.com/api/ai): JSON inventory of public surfaces
- [Homepage markdown](https://performance.sassmaker.com/index.md): Product brief without JS
- [This index](https://performance.sassmaker.com/llms.txt)

## Optional

- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Parent fleet showcase
